zh.lifeSummary: Fulco Oilly是Simon FitzBaldwin d'Oyrieres和Unknown的兒子，於1152年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾德尼。他與Matilda le Strange在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾德尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1227年9月29日之後，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾德尼。

nameMeanings.name: Oilly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Walloon: habitational name from Billy, the name of several places mainly in the northern part of France. The placename is from Gallo-Roman Billiacum, from the Gallic personal name Billios (from Latin Billius) + the locative suffix -acum.
English: habitational name from any of several places called Billy, such as Billy Row in Brancepeth (Durham), or Billy Farm in Somerset.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Billy, a pet form of Mabel or Sibyl.

variants.name: Bily
meanings: Czech (Bílý and Bilý) and Slovak (Bilý, also Bíly); Ukrainian and Rusyn (standard transliteration Bilyy): nickname for a fair-haired man, from Czech (and Slovak dialect) bílý, Ukrainian and Rusyn bilyy ‘white’. Compare Bila and Billie 3.

nameMeanings.name: Fulco
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Guido, Mario, Mauricio, Osvaldo.  Spanish Jose, Ana, Angel, Jorge.
Italian: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with the element folk ‘people’.

en.lifeSummary: Fulco Oilly was born in 1152, in Gedney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Simon FitzBaldwin d'Oyrieres and Unknown. He married Matilda le Strange in Gedney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died after 29 September 1227, and was buried in Gedney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Fulco Oilly est né en 1152, à Gedney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Simon FitzBaldwin d'Oyrieres et Unknown. Il a épousé Matilda le Strange à Gedney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé après 29 septembre 1227, et a été enterré à Gedney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Fulco Oillyは1152年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアジェドニーでSimon FitzBaldwin d'OyrieresとUnknownの息子として生まれた。イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアジェドニーでMatilda le Strangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1227年9月29日以後に死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアジェドニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Fulco Oilly(은)는 1152년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 게드니에서 Simon FitzBaldwin d'Oyrieres(와)과 Unknown의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 게드니에서 Matilda le Strange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1227년 9월 29일 이후 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 게드니에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Fulco Oilly родился в 1152 г. в местности джедни, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Simon FitzBaldwin d'Oyrieres и Unknown. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda le Strange в местности джедни, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер после 29 сентябрь 1227 г. и был похоронен в местности джедни, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
